message:
Command `# 49 min elapsed, repair still computing (log frozen since 11:45, now 11:58 = 13 min).
# OpenROAD at 99.9% CPU doing intensive timing analysis.
# The watcher script hasn't logged any polls yet -- possibly the nohup didn't start properly.
# Let me verify the watcher and set up a fresh monitoring.
cat /tmp/pnr_watch.log
echo "---"
pgrep -f "pnr_watch.sh" && echo "watcher running" || echo "watcher not running"
echo ""
# Start a simple long-running wait loop
WRAPPER_RUN="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run"
LOG="/tmp/librelane_final.log"
LR_PID=363476

# Single long wait then comprehensive check
sleep 3600
echo "=== 1h wait done: $(date) ==="
ps -p $LR_PID -o pid,stat,pcpu,pmem,etime 2>/dev/null && echo "LR alive" || echo "LR DONE"
ls -t "$WRAPPER_RUN/" | grep "^[0-9]" | head -10
ls "$WRAPPER_RUN/final/gds/" 2>/dev/null && echo "GDS!" || echo "no GDS"
stat -c "size=%s mtime=%y" "$LOG"
tail -5 "$LOG"` executed with exit code -1.

tail -5 "$LOG"" timed out
